Test Scenario: Create new Shipper account
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to auth view and click "Register" tab.
2. Enter a unique username, password, and company name.
3. Keep the role selected as "Shipper" and submit the form.
Expected Result: Account created successfully; database record initialized; user is redirected to the OTP verification screen.

Testing Objective: Verify email activation flow using OTP
Test Scenario: Verify registration with 6-digit OTP code
Test Steps:
1. Check registration logs or debug console for the generated OTP code.
2. Enter the 6-digit OTP code in the input field and click verify.
Expected Result: User account marked active ("emailVerified: true"); logged in automatically; redirected to dashboard.
Notes: Falls back to debug console print if SMTP environment variables are unconfigured.

Test Scenario: Attempt verification with invalid OTP code
Test Steps:
1. Enter an incorrect 6-digit number in the OTP field.
2. Click "Verify".
Expected Result: Shows error "Invalid verification code"; user account remains unverified (inactive).

Test Scenario: Resend verification email OTP
Test Steps: 1. Click "Resend OTP" link on the verification screen.
Expected Result: Generates a new 6-digit code; resets the 5-minute expiry timer; shows toast notification confirming resend.

Testing Objective: Verify secure login using normal credentials
Test Scenario: Sign in with valid username and password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to auth screen and click "Login" tab.
2. Input registered username and password.
3. Click "Sign In".
Expected Result: User authenticated successfully; role loaded; redirected to Shipper/Carrier dashboard.

Testing Objective: Verify quick social login via Google
Test Scenario: Register or sign in with Google account
Test Steps:
1. Click "Google" button on the login card.
2. Authorize account in pop-up screen.
3. Choose role and company name if first login.
Expected Result: Google token validated; user account created/logged in instantly; marked as pre-verified.

Testing Objective: Verify quick social login via iCloud
Test Scenario: Register or sign in with Apple iCloud account
Test Steps:
1. Click "iCloud" button on the login card.
2. Input details on iCloud consent card.
3. Complete mock authentication.
Expected Result: iCloud ID validated; user logged in successfully; marked pre-verified.

Test Scenario: Modify account email and phone number
Test Steps:
1. Open Profile/Settings drawer or modal.
2. Modify email or phone fields.
3. Click "Save Profile".
Expected Result: New fields saved to database; profile updates immediately across UI; success toast displayed.

Test Scenario: Clear active session state
Test Steps: 1. Click the "Logout" button in the navigation header.
Expected Result: Session variables cleared; localStorage updated; view redirected to public Landing view; navigation links reset.

Test Scenario: Post new standard Freight load
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a Shipper.
2. Fill out Post Shipment form (locations, weight, budget, dimensions).
3. Select type "Freight".
4. Click "Submit".
Expected Result: Load successfully saved with status "Open / Bidding"; shows in Shipper list; visible to Carriers.

Test Scenario: Input locations with autocomplete suggestions
Test Steps: 1. Type search query (e.g. "Chicago") in Pickup or Delivery input.
Expected Result: Autocompletion menu overlays showing matching locations; selecting a suggestion fills text and logs coordinates.

Testing Objective: Verify dynamic form inputs per cargo type
Test Scenario: Select "Vehicle Transport" cargo type
Test Steps:
1. Open the Post Shipment form.
2. Select "Vehicle Transport" from Shipment Type dropdown.
Expected Result: Form dynamically shows "Vehicle Details" sections (Vehicle sub-type, Make, Model, Year, VIN fields).

Test Scenario: Input 17-character VIN with network connection
Test Steps:
1. Type valid 17-character VIN in the VIN input box.
2. Wait for automatic validation.
Expected Result: NHTSA VPIC API queried; auto-fills vehicle make, model, and year fields; displays verification checkmark.
Notes: Uses live HTTPS requests to dot.gov.

Test Scenario: Input VIN with no network/API failure fallback
Test Steps:
1. Enter VIN starting with known prefix (e.g. 5YJ for Tesla).
2. Force network offline or trigger fallback.
Expected Result: Decodes locally via regex-based decodeVINString; correctly populates make/model; prints status toast.

Test Scenario: Attach photos to shipment post
Test Steps:
1. Click "Add Photos" on posting form.
2. Select an image file.
Expected Result: File processed into Base64 format; preview thumbnail renders; saved under shipment database record.
Notes: Compressed to avoid exceeding storage limits.

Test Scenario: Filter My Shipments list by status
Test Steps: 1. On Shipper dashboard, select tabs "Open", "Assigned", or "Completed".
Expected Result: Lists are instantly filtered to show only shipments matching the selected status.

Test Scenario: Inspect open shipments on carrier board
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Carrier.
2. Navigate to "Load Board".
Expected Result: Displays all loads currently open for bids; hides restricted shipper details.

Testing Objective: Verify load board query filter mechanisms
Test Scenario: Search loads by keyword and cargo type
Test Steps:
1. Enter text in carrier search bar.
2. Choose cargo type from dropdown.
Expected Result: List updates in real-time showing matches for location names, types, or budgets.

Test Scenario: Open load details modal to inspect route
Test Steps: 1. Click "View Details" on any open load.
Expected Result: Details modal opens showing full details and route line connecting origin/destination on the map.
Notes: Uses Leaflet map / SVG route path.

Test Scenario: Propose price, delivery date, and message
Test Steps:
1. Click "Submit Bid" in details.
2. Enter bid amount, delivery date, and text pitch.
3. Click "Submit".
Expected Result: Bid saved to database; bid count updates on load board; shows in Carrier's active bids dashboard.

Test Scenario: Shipper awards load to specific carrier bid
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Shipper, open shipment.
2. Review bid list, click "Accept Bid" on carrier.
Expected Result: Shipment status changes to "Assigned"; carrier assigned; other bids rejected; route unlocked.

Test Scenario: Carrier starts transit on active job
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Carrier, open "My Jobs".
2. Click "Start Transit" on assigned shipment.
Expected Result: Status updates to "In Transit" in store; Shipper dashboard reflects update immediately.

Test Scenario: Carrier marks active job as completed
Test Steps: 1. On Carrier active jobs, click "Mark Delivered" on "In Transit" load.
Expected Result: Status updates to "Delivered"; load board updates; final logs recorded.

Test Scenario: Exchange messages between carrier and shipper
Test Steps:
1. Open active bid, click "Message".
2. Send plain text messages.
Expected Result: Message log loaded and saved dynamically per bid; displays messages with timestamp and sender tags.

Test Scenario: Send counter-offer amount in bid chat
Test Steps:
1. Open chat modal.
2. Type an offer amount in input field, click "Send Offer".
Expected Result: Message posted with pricing offer banner; updates bid's current proposed price in database.

Testing Objective: Verify user address information mask rules
Test Scenario: View unawarded shipment details as Carrier
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Carrier.
2. Inspect a shipment you are bidding on.
Expected Result: Street addresses and precise coordinate details are hidden; shows only general city and state.
Notes: Unlocks exact coordinates upon bid acceptance.

Test Scenario: Browse public loads and bids
Test Steps: 1. Open Load Board as guest or carrier.
Expected Result: Shipper/Carrier name displays as anonymized string (e.g. "Shipper #A42B") unless awarded.

Test Scenario: Try to send phone number/email in bid chat
Test Steps:
1. Open chat, type email "john@carrier.com" or phone "555-1234".
2. Click Send.
Expected Result: Message blocked/redacted; user warned of compliance policy violation; violation count incremented.

Test Scenario: Perform writes with Firebase credentials set
Test Steps:
1. Set Firestore credentials.
2. Add cargo or bids.
Expected Result: Writes synced directly to Firebase Cloud; local caching automatically updated.

Test Scenario: Perform writes with empty/default config
Test Steps:
1. Set firebaseConfig to empty placeholders.
2. Reload app, interact.
Expected Result: Fallback warning displayed in console; mock store stores state in HTML5 localStorage; operations continue offline.

Test Scenario: POST email payload to `/api/send-email`
Test Steps: 1. POST request with mock/real SMTP variables to API.
Expected Result: If variables missing, returns 400 with missing fields list. If present, delivers email.

Test Scenario: Query health check route `/api/health-check`
Test Steps: 1. Query GET `/api/health-check` via HTTP client.
Expected Result: Runs self-connection checks on SMTP server; reports connection health and success state.
